## Meeting Purpose

[Virtual onsite interview and coding exercise for Ben Church with GrowthX.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ben will work on a TypeScript project involving GINA AI and OpenAI APIs to create a content processing pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The project includes creating an in-brief, translating to Spanish, and fact-checking content from a given URL](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Daniel provided a starter kit with boilerplate code and necessary dependencies](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Ben will have about 50-60 minutes to work on the project, focusing on demonstrating his approach and thought process](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview and Requirements

  - [Input: URL of an article](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Steps:](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
    1.  Fetch and convert article to Markdown using GINA AI
    2.  Create an in-brief (2-5 bullet points of key insights)
    3.  Translate content to Spanish (excluding URLs)
    4.  Extract fact-checkable statements
  - [Output: Save results as JSON file](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Tech stack: TypeScript, Node.js, OpenAI SDK, Zod for schema validation](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Optional: Use of Liquid.js for prompt templating](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Development Environment and Tools

  - [Starter kit provided with TypeScript setup and some dependencies](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Cursor.sh recommended as code editor (with some preconfigured rules)](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [GPT-4 API key provided for OpenAI interactions](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Ben plans to use SuperWhisperer for prompt optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### Ben's Proposed Approach

1.  Set up documentation files and update README
2.  Create utility functions for GINA AI and OpenAI
3.  Add tests to confirm functionality
4.  Set up debugger for iterative development
5.  Implement main logic and prompts
6.  (Optional) Optimize for parallel processing if time allows

### Additional Context

  - [GrowthX.ai focuses on content creation, recruiting, and sales workflows](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [The company is building platforms to support various AI-driven tasks](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [This project represents a common use case in their business](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ben to work on the project for 50-60 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Daniel will be available in chat for any questions](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [After the coding session, they'll reconvene to discuss the implementation and any questions](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Ben expressed interest in speaking with Marcel (co-founder) to understand the long-term vision; Daniel will arrange this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/hazsFjzYEf4SLxK_8zibvf-5yByyYZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
